name: Pinned Tabs Customizer

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Polished code for reducing warnings in the Community webpage.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Pinned Tabs Customizer v1.0.0

🎉 **Initial Release**

Customize your pinned tabs with custom icons and adjustable widths!

## Key Features

- Resize pinned tabs
- Assign icons using file names, folders, patterns, or tags
- Multiple matching methods: exact, folder, starts-with, ends-with, contains, regex, and tag-based
- Pattern editor with presets and live preview
- Frontmatter support for per-file customization
- Conflict detection and statistics badges
- Drag-and-drop reordering for rule priority
- Comprehensive icon picker with emojis, Obsidian icons, and custom text

## Installation

Install via Community Plugins or download manually from the releases page.

See the [README](https://github.com/diegomarzaa/obsidian-pinned-tabs-customizer) for full documentation.

---

**Note**: Desktop only. Requires Obsidian 1.1.0 or higher.
